programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
A 1.3m swell and cross-wind mean it'll be a workout paddling to the peak for whatever reforms.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell and crosswind suggest a session of fighting chop for small victories.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell and crosswind suggest a session of fighting chop for small victories.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell with that onshore wind? Probably better for a walk on the beach than a bodyboard.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 1.3m waves will be bumpy and short-lived, perfect for refining one's sand-avoidance techniques.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With onshore breeze and a meter-plus swell, expect some wobbly closeouts and a good swim.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.3m swell with onshore wind suggests a choppy morning workout, if you're feeling masochistic.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
A 1.2m swell and cross-shore breeze suggests a fairly average day for getting mildly worked.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell and cross-wind suggest a session of battling wonky ramps, punctuated by long swims.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell and crosswind might offer a few rides, or just a face full of Atlantic grit.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That onshore breeze will likely turn those 1.2m waves into a bumpy washing machine, best suited for practicing rescues.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 1.2m waves might offer a ride or two before the onshore wind turns them into something resembling choppy soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.2m and onshore wind, today's Lagide will likely deliver a mixed bag of chop and closeouts.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
